name: mojo-confusion-matrix-integration-tests
description: Pattern for adding ConfusionMatrix integration tests to a Mojo ValidationLoop test file. Use when: (1) a ValidationLoop accepts compute_confusion=True but has no test covering that path, (2) need to verify ConfusionMatrix cell counts with known binary fixtures in Mojo, (3) adding coverage for compute_confusion flag without running full Mojo runtime locally.
